user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the benefit management module, so that I can control whether benefits functionality is available in the HRMS
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Benefits Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the benefit management module?"; Then my choice is captured for the module configuration

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my benefit management configuration, so that my selection is persisted and applied to the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen Yes or No for the benefit management module; When I click Save; Then the configuration is saved and the benefit management module state is updated

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel changes to the benefit setup, so that I can discard an unintended selection without saving
acceptance_criteria: Given I have changed the benefit management selection; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded and no configuration change is applied
